policy.public_visibility: Only completed editions in data/content/state-of-the-field are rendered on the public State of the Field pages.
policy.draft_storage: Drafts, reconciliation notes, and in-progress states stay in this ops manifest or extra/ artifacts until publication.
policy.publish_gate: An edition can be treated as published only after public updates are classified, stale trial claims are resolved or bounded, review metadata is updated, and validation/editorial checks pass.

editions.title: May 2026 in review
editions.status_note: Reconciliation closed without changing the public May edition. The five current-story updates missing from the May edition were June public updates or June-reviewed context that did not change the May 2026 conclusion.

observed_published_edition.review_reason: Post-publication editorial rollup after the June 12 senolytics update confirmed that the May 2026 retrospective conclusion remains unchanged; no result or outlook change was added to the covered period.

editions.required_next_action: Start the July State of the Field edition for June 2026 and carry the deferred June updates there as June context or field signals, not as May field movement.
blockers: Trial-watch report has open stale or missing registry checks; do not make fresh trial-status claims without surveillance or explicit stale-record boundaries.

reconciliation_items.rationale: This was a June 6 missing-context update. It improved public boundary wording for reverse-transcriptase-inhibitor biomarkers, trials to watch, program activity, and biology context while preserving the track stage, momentum, read firmness, and LEV timing read.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Use this as June context in the July edition if the June review needs a transposon/somatic-mutation example.

reconciliation_items.rationale: This was a June 7 field-change update adding mianserin/Ca2+ animal lifespan and human-cell senescence support while keeping the public stage unchanged. It did not belong to May and did not change the May conclusion.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Use this as a June senomorphics signal in the July edition if it helps explain why senescence-adjacent evidence remains bounded.

reconciliation_items.rationale: This was a June 10 missing-context update that added urolithin A safety, registry, and limiting-context records while preserving the mitophagy stage and read. The May edition already states that mitophagy did not change the May conclusion.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Use this as June mitophagy context in the July edition, especially for safety and no-results registry boundaries.

reconciliation_items.rationale: This was a June 11 field-change update adding a small older-adult spermidine vaccine-response pilot. It was a June signal, not May evidence, and it preserved the track at an early human biomarker stage.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Use this as a June field signal in the July edition, bounded as small, subgroup-limited, and not proof of lasting aging-relevant function.

reconciliation_items.rationale: This was a June 12 missing-context update that strengthened the partial-reprogramming animal map and added the ER-100 no-results human registry boundary while preserving animal_signal and accelerating momentum. It did not change the May conclusion.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Use this as a June frontier-context item in the July edition, with the human-outcomes boundary explicit.

checklist.label: Refresh the trial watch report before drafting or revising trial horizon copy.
Classify current-story public updates missing from the May edition.
Revise the May edition only for post-hoc context or material correction decisions.
Run validation and editorial checks after any public content revision.
checklist.command: npm run validate:records && npm run audit:editorial:ratchet && npm run typecheck && npm run build

editions.title: June 2026 in review
editions.status_note: Internal draft opened while June is still in progress. The candidate public skeleton now accounts for the current-story June updates plus six additional June public updates, but all July reconciliation decisions stay open until the retrospective period closes.
editions.required_next_action: Keep the July edition internal until June closes, then finalize the provisional classifications for the 16 known June public updates and write the public 2026-07 edition from reviewed records.
blockers: June 2026 has not ended yet; this cannot be a final retrospective edition before 2026-07-01.

The June 14 trial-watch report has 69 stale or missing registry checks and 4 open stale watchlist records; do not make fresh trial-status claims without surveillance or explicit stale-record boundaries.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June missing-context update that narrowed reverse-transcriptase-inhibitor, trial, program, DREAM, and CHIP boundaries without changing stage, momentum, read firmness, or LEV timing.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Classify as June current-context unless the final edition needs it as a named example of better claim boundaries.

reconciliation_items.rationale: Activity-only registry refresh: exPDite-2 remained recruiting with no posted results and did not change the outlook.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Classify as activity_without_results or omit from public July copy if it is too process-like.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June field-change update adding mianserin/Ca2+ animal lifespan and human-cell senescence support while preserving the track stage.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Consider as a June field_signal, bounded as preclinical and not treated-human proof.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June missing-context update that improved MIB-626, registry, and review boundaries without changing stage, momentum, or read firmness.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Classify as current_context unless a trial-horizon item needs explicit NAD/redox coverage.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June missing-context update that added no-results hDNAgr registry and review context while adding no posted human efficacy or safety results.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Classify as current_context or trial-horizon boundary.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June missing-context update that added urolithin A safety, registry, and limiting context while preserving the track read.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Classify as current_context, with possible trial_horizon support after stale registry boundaries are checked.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June context update added NPC open-label extension and current Miplyffa label safety context while preserving a disease-specific, mixed read.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Classify as current_context if the July edition needs a proteostasis example.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June field-change update adding a small older-adult spermidine vaccine-response pilot while preserving the early human biomarker stage.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Consider as a June field_signal, bounded as small, subgroup-limited, and not proof of lasting aging-relevant function.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June missing-context update added D+Q and fisetin biomarker, function, safety, animal, and no-results registry context while keeping senolytics at an early human biomarker stage.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Classify as current_context unless senolytics is chosen as a flagship boundary example.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June missing-context update strengthened the animal source map and added ER-100 as a no-results human registry boundary while preserving animal_signal and accelerating momentum.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Classify as current_context or a frontier boundary item; keep the absence of human outcomes explicit.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June field-change update added a disease-specific synbiotic constipation RCT and a null healthy-older-adult exercise/microbiome RCT while keeping the track at a tentative human biomarker stage.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Consider as a bounded June field_signal or as current_context for microbiome evidence boundaries.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June field-change update added a Pediococcus acidilactici PA53 older-adult well-being and gut-health RCT while keeping the track tentative and without a LEV timing upgrade.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Consider as a bounded June field_signal if the final edition needs a microbiome/live-biotherapeutic example.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June field-change update attached DREAM repression evidence to DNA repair enhancement and refreshed the track while keeping it at a tentative human biomarker stage.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Classify as a mechanistic field_signal or current_context; avoid implying tested systemic human repair enhancement.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June missing-context update added autophagy registry and review boundaries while keeping the track at a tentative human biomarker stage with mixed momentum.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Fold into the autophagy June field-signal item or trial-horizon boundaries rather than treating it as a separate public change.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June missing-context update added older-adult immune-function anchors, RTB101 limiting context, direct immune-aging registry context, and review boundaries while keeping the track at human functional benefit but lowering the read to mixed and tentative.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Consider as a June outlook-boundary item; be explicit that the clearer read is not an overall LEV upgrade.

reconciliation_items.rationale: June missing-context update moved rapalogs to a tentative human functional read with mixed momentum because human functional endpoints have been tested, while durable disease, frailty, mortality, and broad healthy-aging benefit remain unproven.
reconciliation_items.next_action: Decide whether rapalogs should be the prominent June outlook-boundary item in what_changed.

checklist.label: Refresh the trial watch report before drafting trial horizon copy.
Create internal July draft artifacts under extra/ without publishing public edition JSON.
Wait until the June 2026 retrospective period closes before publishing data/content/state-of-the-field/2026-07.json.
Classify June public updates into what_changed, current_context, trial_horizon, or omitted process context.
Write the public July edition from reviewed records after the period closes.
Run validation, state-of-field status, editorial ratchet, typecheck, and build before publication.
checklist.command: npm run validate:records && npm run state-of-field:status -- --strict && npm run audit:editorial:ratchet && npm run typecheck && npm run build
